author: y4rr
content:
Plan: Add FeatureExtractor integration tests for #873 in conformance_vision_models.rs.

Tests to add:
1. feature_extractor_unet_integration — FeatureExtractor on UNet, request enc1+bottleneck+head, verify shapes match expected.
2. feature_extractor_yolo_integration — FeatureExtractor on Yolo, request stage1+stage5+head, verify shapes.
3. feature_extractor_output_matches_manual_forward — extracted features at a named node == running model up to that layer manually. Use Yolo.stage5 (512 channels) or UNet enc1 (64 channels).
4. Remove cascade_skip from create_feature_extractor_smoke — replace with real test.

Decision: Use UNet + Yolo as base models (not ResNet/DenseNet) since they are the focus of this sprint and already implement IntermediateFeatures. This avoids dependency on B.5.a ResNet fix. DenseNet/VGG are also valid as backup.

cascade_skip removal: The create_feature_extractor_smoke test in conformance_vision_models.rs currently cascade_skips. This sprint removes that skip and replaces it with a real integration test.
